message:
fix: add missing [vars] declarations to 9 formula files (gt-tfr3en)

Template variables used in formula step descriptions were not declared
in [vars], causing TestAllEmbeddedFormulas_VariableValidation to fail.
Added default="" var entries for computed variables and required=true
for rig in polecat formulas.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -207,3 +207,23 @@ or retire the dog if pool is oversized.
 [vars.convoy]
 description = "The convoy ID to archive"
 required = true
+
+[vars.contributor_list]
+description = "List of contributing polecats (computed during execution)"
+default = ""
+
+[vars.duration]
+description = "Total convoy duration (computed during execution)"
+default = ""
+
+[vars.generated_summary]
+description = "Generated convoy summary text (computed during execution)"
+default = ""
+
+[vars.issue_count]
+description = "Number of issues in the convoy (computed during execution)"
+default = ""
+
+[vars.work_duration]
+description = "Duration of this dog's work (computed during execution)"
+default = ""

 [vars.convoy]

+[vars.report_summary]

 [vars.resolved_issue]

@@ -196,3 +196,8 @@ The daemon will:
 Polecats are NOT auto-respawned. Use `gt sling` or let Witness
 restart them based on their preserved hooks.
 """

+default = ""
